scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-web build && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-ui build && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-testing build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-web test && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-ui test && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-testing test
scripts.test:ci: bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-web test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-ui test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/polyterm-testing test --randomize --rerun-each 3
